tour.title: Welcome to the 3D Highway
tour.content: This plugin renders your song's note chart as a live 3D highway. Let's take a quick look at what you can do.

tour.title: The Note Highway
tour.content: Notes flow toward you in 3D. The glowing horizontal line marks the strum point — hit notes as they cross it.

tour.title: Auto-Tracking Camera
tour.content: The camera automatically follows the action, smoothly panning to keep the active fret range in frame. Adjust camera height, distance, and smoothing in Settings → 3D Highway.

tour.title: Customise the Look
tour.content: Open Settings → 3D Highway to change colour palettes, background effects, glow intensity, and camera smoothing.

tour.title: You're ready to shred
tour.content: That's the 3D Highway. Load a song and hit Play to see it in action. Restart this tour any time with the ? button.
